testCases.title: Verify that system validates mandatory Vacancy Name field when creating a job vacancy

steps.expected: Configured credentials should be entered successfully

steps.action: Enter Job Title "QA Engineer", leave Vacancy Name empty, select Hiring Manager, and enter Number of Positions "1"
steps.expected: Vacancy Name field should remain empty

steps.action: Click Save button and verify validation error is displayed
steps.expected: System should display required field validation error for Vacancy Name
